tier: Tier 7.7v - Repair Candidate Compact Score (Family B)
claim: Tier 7.7v scores the Repair Family B candidate (orthogonalized input projections + block-structured recurrence) on Mackey-Glass/Lorenz/repaired-NARMA10 at 8000 steps, seed 42. The candidate achieves PR=5.49 vs orthogonal baseline PR=2.01, beats the shuffled_input control (PR=4.57), and confirms the input-encoder bottleneck as the primary low-rank collapse mechanism.
caveat: Compact repair scoring on one seed only; not expanded confirmation at longer lengths/more seeds, not mechanism promotion, not a baseline freeze, not public usefulness proof, and not hardware/native transfer.
